name: dg_element_architecture
description: dg element architecture in S. pombe centromeres. ~4.6 kb tandem repeat unit found in the otr domain of all three centromeres at 80-95% pairwise identity. Source of the centromeric small RNAs that direct RNAi-Clr4 H3K9 methylation.

architecture.internal_structure: 4600 bp unit tandemly repeated; shared across cen1/2/3

expected_copy_count: 10-40 copies total across the three centromeres
